mapper.select: SELECT c.coupon_id as couponId, c.from_id as fromId, c.to_id as toId, c.date, c.status, c.coupon_num as couponNum, t.category, t.percent, t.coupon_name as couponName, t.max_amount as maxAmount, t.coupon_count as couponCount, t.gym_id as gymId, m.name as from_name FROM "h_coupon" c INNER JOIN "h_coupon_type" t ON c.coupon_num = t.coupon_num LEFT JOIN "h_member" m ON c.from_id = m.username WHERE c.to_id = #{username} ORDER BY c.date ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "h_coupon" (from_id, to_id, coupon_num, date, status) VALUES (#{fromId}, #{toId}, #{couponNum}, #{date}, '미사용')

INSERT INTO "h_coupon_type" (category, percent, coupon_name, gym_id, max_amount, coupon_count, send_count) VALUES (#{category}, #{percent}, #{couponName}, #{gymId}, #{maxAmount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{couponCount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT coupon_num as couponNum, category, percent, coupon_name as couponName, gym_id as gymId, max_amount as maxAmount, coupon_count as couponCount, send_count as sendCount FROM "h_coupon_type" WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} ORDER BY coupon_num DESC

SELECT c.coupon_id as couponId, c.from_id as fromId, c.to_id as toId, c.date, c.status, c.coupon_num as couponNum, t.category, t.percent, t.coupon_name as couponName, t.max_amount as maxAmount, t.coupon_count as couponCount, t.gym_id as gymId FROM "h_coupon" c INNER JOIN "h_coupon_type" t ON c.coupon_num = t.coupon_num WHERE c.coupon_id = #{couponId}
mapper.update: UPDATE "h_coupon" SET status = '기간만료' WHERE status = '미사용' AND date < CURRENT_DATE
mapper.select: SELECT c.coupon_id as couponId, c.to_id as toId, c.from_id as fromId, t.coupon_name as couponName FROM "h_coupon" c INNER JOIN "h_coupon_type" t ON c.coupon_num = t.coupon_num WHERE c.status = '미사용' AND c.date = CURRENT_DATE + #{days}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "h_coupon" WHERE to_id = #{toId} AND coupon_num = #{couponNum} AND status = '미사용'

SELECT c.coupon_id as couponId, c.to_id as toId, c.from_id as fromId, c.date, c.status, c.coupon_num as couponNum, t.category, t.percent, t.coupon_name as couponName, t.coupon_count as couponCount, t.gym_id as gymId, m.name as toName, COALESCE(cr.status, 0) as churnStatus FROM "h_coupon" c INNER JOIN "h_coupon_type" t ON c.coupon_num = t.coupon_num INNER JOIN "h_member" m ON c.to_id = m.username LEFT JOIN "h_churn_result" cr ON c.to_id = cr.username AND cr.churn_date = CURRENT_DATE WHERE t.category = '체험권' AND t.gym_id = #{gymId} ORDER BY c.coupon_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE "h_churn_result" SET status = 1 WHERE username = #{username} AND churn_date = CURRENT_DATE AND status = 0
